name: qrss
description: Narrow-band QRSS spectrogram grabber. Renders a high-resolution scrolling waterfall for visually reading very-slow CW (QRSS) and MEPT beacons well below the noise floor.
author: UberSDR

span.description: Displayed bandwidth in Hz (zoom width around the click-selected centre)

fftSize.description: FFT size — larger gives finer frequency resolution (slower to fill)

secPerPixel.description: Waterfall time resolution in seconds per column (total window = this × width)

windowSec.description: Fixed total on-screen time in seconds; 0 = Auto (derived from Speed × width)

colormap.description: Colour palette (qrss, viridis, inferno, afmhot, grayscale)

autoContrast.description: Automatically track the noise floor for the dB range
